author: qingxuanlin-s
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A visual knowledge-processing workspace for Obsidian: connect notes, shape MOCs, build mind  maps, and turn Zettelkasten-style thinking into navigable thought maps.

manifest.author: qingxuanlin-s
manifest.description: A visual knowledge-processing workspace: connect notes, shape MOCs, build mind maps, and turn Zettelkasten-style thinking into navigable thought maps.
manifest.name: Thought Navigator

name: Thought Navigator

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

### 新增
- 收起按钮改为 hover 节点即可点击

### 修复
- 修复展开后子树重叠
- 收起节点时让一级子节点也参与聚拢，填补被收起子树的空当

### 优化
- CLI 无头布局改用 DomTextMeasurer 真实测量，与视图像素级一致

---

## English

### Added
- The collapse button can now be clicked on hover nodes.

### Fixed
- Fixed overlapping of subtrees after expansion.
- First-level child nodes also participate in collapsing when a node is collapsed, filling in the gaps left by the collapsed subtree.

### Improved
- The CLI headless layout now uses DomTextMeasurer for accurate measurement, aligning with the pixel level of the view.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

### 新增
- URI add-node 支持向已有 .moc 父节点追加子节点
- 支持通过 obsidian:// URI 创建 .moc 文件
- 暴露 plugin.api(createMOC/addNode/addNodes)供 Obsidian CLI eval 调用
- CLI/程序化创建 auto MOC 时直接算好居中坐标(消除打开后的居中闪动)

### 修复
- CLI 无头布局用真实节点高度估算(≈92),对齐手动版竖向间距
- CLI/程序化创建的 auto MOC 首次打开时居中重排
- 自动布局 reflow 时让根的一级子节点也对称重排,使根节点居中

### 其他
- 创建 .moc + 自动布局居中功能优化
- 插件 External API 设计与使用文档

---

## English

### Added
- URI add-node supports appending child nodes to existing .moc parent nodes
- Support creating .moc files via obsidian:// URI
- Expose plugin.api(createMOC/addNode/addNodes) for Obsidian CLI eval usage
- Automatically calculate centered coordinates when creating auto MOC programmatically (eliminating centering flicker on open)

### Fixed
- In headless layout, use actual node height estimation (≈92) to align manual vertical spacing
- Center re-layout on first opening of the auto MOC created via CLI/programmatic methods
- Ensure symmetrical re-layout for first-level child nodes of the root to center the root node during automatic layout reflow

### Other
- Optimization of .moc creation and automatic layout centering
- Documentation for the External API design and usage of the plugin

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

### 修复
- 修复了 Cmd+V 和 Scratchpad 的优先级冲突问题。
- Cmd+V 现在优先读取外部剪贴板，避免被 Scratchpad 抢先粘贴。
- localStorage 现在持久化“插件写入剪贴板的文本”，以便跨重启识别残留。
- 解决了内部剪贴板粘性导致系统剪贴板永远不读取的问题。

---

## English

### Fixed
- Fixed a priority conflict between Cmd+V and Scratchpad.
- Cmd+V now prioritizes reading from the external clipboard to avoid being overwritten by Scratchpad.
- localStorage now persists "text written to clipboard by plugins" for cross-restart recognition.
- Resolved an issue where the internal clipboard's stickiness would prevent the system clipboard from being read.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

### 新增
- 实现更新公告功能

### 修复
- 修复剪贴板兼容性问题
- 修复文件管理器中的右键功能

---

## English

### Added
- Implemented update announcement feature

### Fixed
- Fixed clipboard compatibility issue
- Fixed right-click functionality in the file manager

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

### 优化
- 用声明式 reflow 替换所有局部布局补丁。
- extBitMap 改为节点级字段，Tab 新建子节点改为下移 parent 到中心。
- 清理 light 主题中间 token 版本的死规则。
- 合并 loading/spinner/moc-selector 重复样式。

---

## English

### Improved
- Replaced all local layout patches with declarative reflow.
- Changed extBitMap to node-level fields; the Tab new child node now moves the parent to the center.
- Cleared dead rules in the middle token version of the light theme.
- Merged duplicate styles of loading, spinner, and moc-selector.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

### 修复
- 修复旧文本节点高度压缩问题

---

## English

### Fixed
- Fix compression issue of old text node height

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

### 修复
- 修复文本节点编辑保存后高度先变高再回落的闪烁
- 修复文本节点编辑后变高及 CM6 编辑器未被使用的问题
- 修复编辑框换行问题

---

## English

### Fixed
- Fixed flickering issue where the text node's height increased and then fell back after saving edits.
- Fixed the issue of text node height increasing after editing and the CM6 editor not being used.
- Fixed line wrapping issue in the editing box.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

### 新增
- 支持文本节点音频渲染

### 修复
- 修复文本节点图片不跟随 zoom 缩放
- 修复文本节点图片缩放

### 优化
- 优化文本节点原地编辑的内存占用

### 其他
- 统一链接打开行为：默认复用当前标签，Cmd/Ctrl 新标签页

---

## English

### Added
- Support for audio rendering in text nodes

### Fixed
- Fixed text node images not following zoom scaling
- Fixed text node image scaling

### Improved
- Optimized memory usage for in-place editing of text nodes

### Other
- Unified link opening behavior: default reuse of the current tab, Cmd/Ctrl for new tab

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Release 0.0.8

## What's Changed
* 0.0.7 by @qingxuanlin-s in https://github.com/qingxuanlin-s/obsidian-thought-navigator/pull/2


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/qingxuanlin-s/obsidian-thought-navigator/compare/0.0.7...0.0.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Improvements
  - Unified the visual hierarchy for level-2 and deeper nodes.
  - Improved text color handling and dimmed-state rendering.
  - Added ancestor-chain highlighting to make the active branch path easier to follow.
  - Improved dimmed-state synchronization for text-node Markdown overlays.
  - Expanded English and Chinese localization for node reminder messages.
  - Updated README screenshots and release documentation.

  ### Fixes & Cleanup
  - Fixed unstable dimmed styling caused by node-state style overrides.
  - Cleaned up CSS validation warnings.
  - Updated the release workflow for a simpler plugin release process.

  ### Compatibility
  - Minimum Obsidian version: `1.8.5`

  ### Assets
  Upload the following files:
  - `main.js`
  - `manifest.json`
  - `styles.css`

releases.author: qingxuanlin-s
releases.description:
Thought Navigator is an Obsidian plugin for building visual, navigable thought trees from your notes. It is designed
   for Zettelkasten-style writing, MOC (Map of Content) workflows, and long-term knowledge navigation.

  ---
  Core Concepts

  Thought Navigator works around MOC files — .moc files that store a visual thought tree: nodes, relations, groups,
  layout state, and display metadata.

  Two main views are provided:

  - Thought Tree View — the main canvas for editing and navigating a MOC.
  - Local Graph View — a contextual graph for the current note, showing nearby tree relations, backlinks, and
  outlinks.

- how to create node

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b7aca561-151d-49c5-823c-789f417c9376



- worksace


https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f0e96c24-2445-43d0-b2bd-fd77a583c768




- other


https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5dfd1339-3dd6-4449-9d18-c35daafe46e9





  ---
  Features

  Visual thought trees
  Create and edit .moc files as interactive node graphs. Add child, sibling, parent, and free nodes. Connect notes
  with directed relations, edit relation labels, and persist node positions across sessions.

  Free layout and auto layout
  Choose between manual free placement and structured auto layout (mind-map style). The layout mode is set per MOC
  file at creation time.

  Node editing
  - Drag nodes and save positions
  - Inline text editing with wiki-link autocomplete ([[)
  - Batch delete or batch color change
  - Resize, recolor, and rename nodes
  - Paste images from clipboard directly into the graph as embedded nodes

  Groups and colors
  Select nodes and group them visually. Rename, resize, recolor, or delete groups. Branch theme colors are
  auto-assigned to level-1 nodes.

  Cross-domain links
  Link a node in one MOC to a node in a different MOC. Cross-domain nodes render as virtual nodes with a distinct
  style.

  Scratchpad
  Copy or cut nodes to a scratchpad, then paste them into another MOC. Supports multiple named pads.

  Project Spaces
  Organize MOC files with virtual folders — no changes to your vault's real folder structure. Create Spaces, add child
   folders, mount or unmount MOCs. Built-in templates: Blank, ZK three-layer (Overview / Topics / Local), and PARA.

  Level breadcrumb navigation
  A breadcrumb bar above the thought tree shows your current depth. Click any segment to focus that level. Switch
  between subtree-focus and level-slice modes, drill down to the deepest child, or hide/dim unrelated branches.

  Local graph view
  Inspect the current note's context: parent, sibling, child notes, inlinks, outlinks, or a combined inlink/outlink
  graph. Configurable file extension filtering, graph direction, and display behavior.

  MOC embed preview
  .moc files render as preview images in Obsidian's Markdown reading mode.

  Search and reveal
  Search inside the tree. Use Reveal current file in tree graph to locate the active note in the thought tree
  instantly.

  Obsidian URI support
  Open graph views from external links using Obsidian URI.

  Full bilingual UI
  All UI strings are available in English and Chinese. Default file names, node titles, and scratchpad names adapt to
  the interface language automatically.

  ---
  Commands
  - **`Open tree graph`** — Open the main thought tree view.
  - **`Open local graph`** — Open the local graph view.
  - **`Reveal current file in tree graph`** — Locate the active file in the thought tree.
  - **`New MOC file`** — Create a new `.moc` thought tree file.
  - **`Mount current MOC to project folder`** — Mount the current MOC into a Project Space folder.

  ---
  Privacy

  Thought Navigator runs entirely locally inside Obsidian. It does not collect telemetry, does not send data to any
  server, and does not require an account.

  ---
  Installation

  Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from this release and place them in:

  .obsidian/plugins/thought-navigator/

  Restart Obsidian and enable Thought Navigator in Community plugins.

  Minimum Obsidian version: 1.8.5

  ---
